subtitles.english: With emotions that can't be stopped

subtitles.original: 手で抱きしめてよ
subtitles.english: Hold them in your hands

subtitles.original: あとどこから通いあう

subtitles.original: ずっともっと近くで
subtitles.english: Always, from much closer

subtitles.original: 認めあいたいわ
subtitles.english: I want us to recognize each other

subtitles.original: 暴く衝動
subtitles.english: Exposing impulses

subtitles.original: もてあますだけなら
subtitles.english: If you're just left with too much

subtitles.original: Tell me what's wrong with me
subtitles.english: Tell me what's wrong with me

subtitles.original: 何も持たないふりだし
subtitles.english: Back to the start with nothing

subtitles.original: 右も左も知りたい
subtitles.english: I want to know both right and left

subtitles.original: And I need you 今すぐ
subtitles.english: And I need you right now

subtitles.original: Oh baby I need you, I need you ずっと
subtitles.english: Oh baby I need you, I need you always

subtitles.original: Oh baby I need you, I need you ずっと
subtitles.english: Oh baby I need you, I need you always

subtitles.original: 逃げるなら 今だぜ お嬢 勝利を願っちゃって
subtitles.english: If you're gonna run, do it now, missy. Pray for victory

subtitles.original: Anya Melfissa!
subtitles.english: Anya Melfissa!

subtitles.original: Vestia Zeta!
subtitles.english: Vestia Zeta!

subtitles.original: Let's go set together, OK!
subtitles.english: Let's go set together, OK!

subtitles.original: Are you ready? もしやチャンスだ遊んねぇ
subtitles.english: Are you ready? Perhaps it's a chance, no playing around

subtitles.original: 迷走めいた半信半疑にほら 誰か人生スキャニング
subtitles.english: In a straying state of half-doubt, look, someone's scanning life

subtitles.original: Out of video 準備万端 今夜勝負に飽き飽きなのよ
subtitles.english: Out of video, all ready, I'm tired of competing tonight

subtitles.original: 弾むパワード残酷私には血の味ね
subtitles.english: Bouncing powered, cruel, to me it's the taste of blood

subtitles.original: 場面密に挑戦 無敵のやまと B20
subtitles.english: Challenge the scene closely, invincible Yamato B20

subtitles.original: オーデッドライトに乗るようなやりだした十人力
subtitles.english: Like riding an Oh-Dead Light, I've started with the strength of ten

subtitles.original: Day by day 初出し あらあら 言ったこと全部ピンを刺した
subtitles.english: Day by day, first appearance, oh my, I've pinned down everything I said

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれたっていいさ 止められないプレイヤー壊しすぎね
subtitles.english: It's okay to laugh, an unstoppable player, breaking too much

subtitles.original: Victory to the world 手に入れた場所の感動はきっとかけがえないはずよ
subtitles.english: Victory to the world, the excitement of the place we've reached must be irreplaceable

subtitles.original: 見てて見てよこの今日 地へいらっしゃって
subtitles.english: Watch, watch this day, welcome to the ground

subtitles.original: わずかな隙間漏らす全て来ない段階 並べた豪奢すぎる思考回路
subtitles.english: Leaking everything through a tiny gap, a stage that won't come, a thought process too luxurious

subtitles.original: 時代中位の上 ここは独断場
subtitles.english: Above the middle of the era, this is my stage

subtitles.original: 拾い上げたワン切り 勝訴私を強くしてくわ
subtitles.english: A one-ring call I picked up, victory makes me stronger

subtitles.original: ポジショニング公社から覗かれるのは尺で
subtitles.english: Being peeked at from the positioning public corp is annoying

subtitles.original: 押し警備 1 2 3 死ぬのは嫌で trip to trip
subtitles.english: Push security 1 2 3, I don't want to die, trip to trip

subtitles.original: 気が付いたらロンリーデイ あれれ隠れていただけ
subtitles.english: When I noticed, it's a lonely day, oh my, I was just hiding

subtitles.original: ねえねねファイティング掲げな ラララ冗談よ全部はキャンセル
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, raise your fighting spirit, tra-la-la, just kidding, everything's canceled

subtitles.original: 開催はやめなさい これが私の憲法になる事も知らずにね
subtitles.english: Stop the event, without knowing this will become my constitution

subtitles.original: Victory to the world 共に作りたいんだ厚き手前箱を
subtitles.english: Victory to the world, I want to create together a thick front box

subtitles.original: 心地良いこの今日 君に染まっちゃって
subtitles.english: In this comfortable today, getting dyed in your color

subtitles.original: Hololive Indonesia! Ayo menyala!
subtitles.english: Hololive Indonesia! Let's light it up!

subtitles.original: Ayo semuanya! Ayo mana suaranya!
subtitles.english: Come on everyone! Let's hear your voice!

subtitles.original: 響け明日へ
subtitles.english: Resonate towards tomorrow

subtitles.original: 冷静不振ブレないで
subtitles.english: Don't waver in calm depression

subtitles.original: Day by day もがいて まだまだ降り出しにカンパとって
subtitles.english: Day by day, struggling, still at the starting point, taking donations

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれたっていいさ 踊れ皆いつかチャンピオン呼び出すだけ
subtitles.english: It's okay to laugh, dance everyone, one day you'll just call out the champion

subtitles.original: Victory to the world 絶対追い抜くあの光で夜明けを
subtitles.english: Victory to the world, I'll definitely overtake with that light, the dawn

subtitles.original: 忘れられないほどの勝利を願っちゃって
subtitles.english: Pray for a victory so great it's unforgettable

subtitles.original: 今日という日を 1 2 G 地へいらっしゃって
subtitles.english: Welcome this day to the ground, 1 2 G

subtitles.original: はあ...
subtitles.english: Haah...

subtitles.original: Siapa di sini yang lelah dengan kehidupan?
subtitles.english: Who here is tired of life?

subtitles.original: Aku! Aku!
subtitles.english: Me! Me!

subtitles.original: Kalau capek enaknya gimana nih, holoID?
subtitles.english: If you're tired, what's the best thing to do, holoID?

subtitles.original: Balas saja! Cakep!
subtitles.english: Just get back at it! Nice!

subtitles.original: Bukannya sudah biasa
subtitles.english: Isn't it already common

subtitles.original: Ditikam oleh kecewa? Aduh!
subtitles.english: To be stabbed by disappointment? Ouch!
